calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition And Motion To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Sep-15-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER MAIN STREET BUSINESS LOANS, LLC'S Petition/Motion To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award is granted. No opposition filed. Prevailing party shall prepare and submit a proposed order for signature. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition And Motion To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar May-18-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER MAIN STREET BUSINESS LOANS, LLC'S Motion To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award is taken off calendar at the request of the moving party. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EHG)
